blended.narrative: Stratton is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 56°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
